keyConceptsLearned: Edge AI vs Cloud AI: Local processing for low latency, privacy, bandwidth optimization
Model Compression: Pruning (remove redundant weights), Quantization (FP32→INT8), Knowledge Distillation
Hardware Accelerators: NPU (edge, real-time), TPU (cloud, training), FPGA (reconfigurable)
Frameworks: TensorFlow Lite (LiteRT), ONNX Runtime, OpenVINO (Intel), TensorRT (NVIDIA)
Federated Learning: Privacy-preserving distributed training, Cloud-Edge-End architecture
Edge Devices: Jetson (NVIDIA), Edge TPU (Google), Intel NPU, mobile devices
LLM/VLM on Edge: Running Llama, GPT models on Jetson devices
NPU vs TPU: NPU for edge/real-time, TPU for cloud/batch training
Optimization Triad: Data, Model, System optimization for edge deployment
nextSourceToRead: Knowledge distillation techniques for model compression
